sticky situations.

data.name: Cheshire Cat
data.flavor_text:
Alice felt quite confused. "But I don't see much
ink here at all. How can the flood still be changing
the Inklands?"
"Things are always changing, you know," said the
cat. "It would be quite a change if they didn't."

keywords.text: (You may pay 4 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Raya.)

abilities.name: Champion of Kumandra
abilities.text: Whenever this character challenges a damaged character, she takes no damage from the challenge.

data.name: Raya
data.flavor_text:
"My ba dreams of a united Kumandra. I fight to
honor that dream."

keywords.name: Rush
keywords.text: (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)

abilities.name: Daddy Isn't Here to Save You
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, you may ready this character. He can't quest for the rest of this turn.

data.name: Shere Khan

abilities.name: Don't Insult My Intelligence
abilities.text: Whenever one of your characters challenges another character, gain 1 lore.

data.flavor_text:
The sixth Rule of Villainy: Keep your mind sharp
and your claws sharper.

data.name: Tigger

abilities.name: Energetic
abilities.text: Whenever you play an action, this character gets +2 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text: Bouncing in to save the day!

data.name: Tuk Tuk

keywords.name: Reckless
keywords.text: (This character can't quest and must challenge each turn if able.)

data.flavor_text: A good friend is always ready to roll.

data.name: Go the Distance
rules: (A character with cost 2 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Ready chosen damaged character of yours. They can't quest for the rest of this turn. Draw a card.

data.name: Teeth and Ambitions
rules: (A character with cost 2 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Deal 2 damage to chosen character of yours to deal 2 damage to another chosen character.
data.flavor_text:
Of course, quid pro quo, you're expected
To take certain duties on board

data.name: The Most Diabolical Scheme
rules: (A character with cost 3 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Banish chosen Villain of yours to banish chosen character.
data.flavor_text:
Now comes the real tour de force
Tricky and wicked, of course

data.name: What Did You Call Me?
rules: Chosen damaged character gets +3 {Strength} this turn.
data.flavor_text:
"No one can have a higher opinion of you than I have,
and I think you're a slimy, contemptible sewer rat!"
—Basil

data.name: You Can Fly!
rules: (A character with cost 2 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Chosen character gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

data.name: Dinner Bell

abilities.name: You Know What Happens
abilities.text: {Exert} — Draw cards equal to the damage on chosen character of yours, then banish them.

data.flavor_text: The delicate sound of impending doom.

data.name: Peter Pan's Dagger
rules: Your characters with Evasive get +1 {Strength}.
data.flavor_text:
Like so much other lore, Peter Pan's dagger was safe in
the Great Illuminary until the flood.

data.name: Sword in the Stone
rules: {Exert} — Chosen character gets +1 {Strength} this turn for each 1 damage on them.
data.flavor_text:
"Whoso pulleth out this sword of this stone and anvil is
rightwise king born of England."

abilities.name: Good Advice
abilities.text: Your other characters gain Support. (Whenever they quest, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

abilities.name: What Did I Do?
abilities.text: While this character has 10 {Strength} or more, she gets +4 {Lore}.

data.name: Basil

keywords.name: Shift 5
keywords.text: (You may pay 5 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Basil.)

abilities.name: There's Always a Chance
abilities.text: If you used Shift to play this character, you may draw 2 cards when he enters play.

data.flavor_text: A solution always presents itself.

data.name: Basil

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.flavor_text:
"What an ingenious device! If its light is refracted
through these, then its images must resolve
somewhere below."

data.name: Basil
data.flavor_text:
"There is no question: something is afoot in the
Great Illuminary."

data.name: Caterpillar
data.flavor_text: "Keep your tempo."

keywords.name: Shift 3
keywords.text: (You may pay 3 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Cogsworth.)

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

abilities.name: Unwind
abilities.text: Your other characters gain Resist +1 (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

data.name: Cogsworth

abilities.name: Wait a Minute
abilities.text: Your characters with Reckless gain "{Exert} — Gain 1 lore."

data.flavor_text: "This has gone far enough. I'm in charge here."

data.name: Cruella De Vil

abilities.name: Now Get Going
abilities.text: During your turn, this character gains Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

data.flavor_text:
"Isn't it just gorgeous, darling? And just as stylish
as I am."

data.name: Cruella De Vil

keywords.name: Shift 3
keywords.text: (You may pay 3 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Cruella De Vil.)

abilities.name: Oh, No You Don't
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, chosen opposing character gets -2 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text: "It's ink couture, darling. I wear only the best!"

data.name: Duke Weaselton

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

data.flavor_text: "It's Wee-sel-ton."

keywords.name: Shift 4
keywords.text: (You may pay 4 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Gaston.)

abilities.name: Developed Brain
abilities.text: When you play this character, look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may put one into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

data.name: Grand Pabbie

abilities.name: Ancient Insight
abilities.text: Whenever you remove 1 or more damage from one of your characters, gain 2 lore.

data.flavor_text: When he talks, even the sky listens.

data.name: Hiram Flaversham

abilities.name: Artificer
abilities.text: When you play this character and whenever he quests, you may banish one of your items to draw 2 cards.

data.flavor_text:
His creations are even more wondrous with the
Illuminary's resources at his fingertips.

abilities.name: Never, Ever Lose Sight
abilities.text: When this character is banished, you may put this card into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.name: Jasmine

abilities.name: I'm a Fast Learner
abilities.text: When you play this character, remove up to 1 damage from chosen character of yours.

data.flavor_text:
She may be young, but she's got the spirit of a
true leader.

data.name: Judy Hopps

abilities.name: Don't Call Me Cute
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may banish chosen item. Its player draws a card.

data.flavor_text:
"I'll get to the bottom of what happened with that
locked lorebook. You can count on me!"

data.name: Mrs. Judson

abilities.name: Tidy Up
abilities.text: Whenever you play a Floodborn character, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.flavor_text:
"I know just the thing. Let me fetch you a pot of
tea and some of my fresh cheese crumpets."

data.name: Nick Wilde

abilities.name: It's Called a Hustle
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may return an item card named Pawpsicle from your discard to your hand.

data.flavor_text: "It's criminal how good these things taste!"

abilities.name: Hide and Seek
abilities.text: While you have an item in play, this character gains Resist +1 and Ward. (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1. Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

data.name: Owl
data.flavor_text:
"For instance, based on the quality of the light and
the subtle change in wind direction, I can safely
say that it is time for tea."

data.name: Prince Charming
data.flavor_text:
He'd searched across the Inklands for the young
woman who'd stolen his heart at the ball, only to
find more mysteries.

data.name: Rabbit
data.flavor_text:
Pooh: "Isn't there anybody here at all?"
Rabbit: "Nobody!"
Pooh: "Somebody's there...because somebody
must have said ‘Nobody.’"

data.name: Sisu

abilities.name: I Trust You
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, look at the top 2 cards of your deck. You may put one into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

data.flavor_text: No matter her shape, you can't mistake her heart.

data.name: The Nokk

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

data.flavor_text: As elusive as water.

data.name: Winnie the Pooh

abilities.name: Hunny Pot
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may put a card from your hand into your inkwell facedown.

data.flavor_text:
When he thought, he thought in the most
thoughtful way he could think.

data.name: Falling Down the Rabbit Hole
rules: Each player chooses one of their characters and puts them into their inkwell facedown and exerted.
data.flavor_text:
Down, down, down she went, floating in a swirl of ink.
How curious!

data.name: Four Dozen Eggs
rules: (A character with cost 4 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Your characters gain Resist +2 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)

data.name: Launch
rules: Banish chosen item of yours to deal 5 damage to chosen character.
data.flavor_text: Ready...aim...coconut?

data.name: Nothing to Hide
rules: Each opponent reveals their hand. Draw a card.
data.flavor_text: Helps you avoid unpleasant surprises.

abilities.name: Careful Aim
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gets -2 {Strength} this turn.

abilities.name: Stay Back!
abilities.text: {Exert} — Banish chosen Dragon character.

data.name: Gumbo Pot

abilities.name: The Best I've Ever Tasted
abilities.text: {Exert} — Remove 1 damage each from up to 2 chosen characters.

data.flavor_text:
"A gift this special just got to be shared."
—James

data.name: Maurice's Workshop

abilities.name: Looking For This?
abilities.text: Whenever you play another item, you may pay 1 {Ink} to draw a card.

data.flavor_text:
The solution you need could be just a few adjustments
away.

abilities.name: Jumbo Pop
abilities.text: When you play this item, you may draw a card.

abilities.name: That's Redwood
abilities.text: {Exert} — Remove up to 2 damage from chosen character.

data.name: Sardine Can

abilities.name: Flight Cabin
abilities.text: Your exerted characters gain Ward. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

data.flavor_text:
"Flight 3759 boarding now! Let's go get that lore!"
—Orville

data.name: Beast

abilities.name: You're Not Welcome Here
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may deal 1 damage to chosen character.

data.flavor_text: Woe to the one who draws his gaze.

data.name: Beast

abilities.name: Shield Another
abilities.text: Whenever one of your other characters would be dealt damage, put that many damage counters on this character instead.

data.flavor_text: "You'll have to go through me first."

data.name: Beast

keywords.name: Shift 3
keywords.text: (You may pay 3 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Beast.)

abilities.name: It's Better This Way
abilities.text: At the start of your turn, if this character has no damage, draw a card. Otherwise, he gets +4 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text: "It must be my destiny—to remain a beast forever."

data.name: Benja

abilities.name: We Have a Choice
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may banish chosen item.

data.flavor_text: "Don't mistake spirit for skill."

data.name: Chief Bogo

abilities.name: Insubordination!
abilities.text: Whenever you play a Floodborn character, deal 1 damage to each opposing character.

data.flavor_text:
"We can confirm the ink flood was caused by an
explosion. We have it under control—now clear
the area."

data.name: Cinderella

abilities.name: Have Courage
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card.

data.flavor_text:
She's always had the heart of a champion—now
she'll have the skills, too.

keywords.name: Shift 5
keywords.text: (You may pay 5 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Cinderella.)

keywords.name: Resist +2
keywords.text: (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 2.)

abilities.name: The Singing Sword
abilities.text: Whenever you play a song, this character may challenge ready characters this turn.

data.name: Donald Duck
data.flavor_text:
"You go ahead, Minnie! I'm going to see if there's
any lore over here."

data.name: Eli La Bouff
data.flavor_text:
"I don't suppose y'all could whip up some more
magical beignets with them inkcasters?"

data.name: Goofy
data.flavor_text:
It's a banner day for Sir Goofy, who is steeled to
prove his mettle against anyone courting trouble—
joust in case.

data.name: Hercules

keywords.name: Shift 4
keywords.text: (You may pay 4 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Hercules.)

keywords.name: Resist +2
keywords.text: (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 2.)

data.flavor_text:
A good guy to have around when something wrecks your
inkworks.

data.name: Hercules
data.flavor_text: No need to call IX-I-I!

data.flavor_text: "Soon you'll learn who holds the real power!"

data.flavor_text: In this new world, the crown could finally be his.

data.name: Li Shang

abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, your characters gain Evasive this turn. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

data.flavor_text:
Learn what to do, then learn to do it without
thought.

data.name: Magic Broom

abilities.name: Make It Shine
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen character gains Resist +1 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

data.flavor_text:
Even with a hauling weight of "seriously, a lot," it can
only do so much in a magical flood.

data.flavor_text:
"Don't be fooled by the folksy peasant look."
—Kuzco

The fourth Rule of Villainy: Do whatever it takes
to get ahead.

"Capable? You don't know the half of it."
—Little John

data.name: Tiana
data.flavor_text:
"My place is going be special, with great food
to fill people's bellies and hot jazz to feed their
souls!"

data.name: Charge!
rules: Chosen character gains Challenger +2 and Resist +2 this turn. (They get +2 {Strength} while challenging. Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)
data.flavor_text:
Sometimes subtlety is required. This is not one of those
times.

data.name: Let the Storm Rage On

Deal 2 damage to chosen character. Draw a card.
data.flavor_text: The cold never bothered me anyway

data.flavor_text: "I'm gonna wreck it!"

data.name: Strength of a Raging Fire

Deal damage to chosen character equal to the number of characters you have in play.
data.flavor_text:
Tranquil as a forest
But on fire within
